title: Repealed
doc_html:
§3693. Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 648, §3, eff. July 1, 2015.

            Acts 1971, No. 80, §13, designated by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991; Acts 2014, No. 648, §3, eff. July 1, 2015.
